title: Re-Start
overview: Yamabuki Arisu is in search of a girl he only knows by her voice.

title: Liar / Nene Himekawa’s Ears Give Her Away
overview: Arisu starts putting together training plans for the broadcast club members. He quickly finds himself focusing on both Rikka’s singing and Nene’s voice-acting ambitions.

title: Lock the Door if You're Embarrassed / I Can't Smile in Front of a Camera!! /  I Can't Smile in Front of You...!
overview: The club girls discover how much time Arisu is spending outside school to support them. Iko decides to open up to him about the problems she’s facing with her VTuber work.

title: All Alone With You Until Dark / Partners in Crime / The Adviser's Name is Literally Lemon-chan
overview: Shinobu struggles to juggle her student-council responsibilities with the broadcast club. She begins sharing some of her deeper worries with Arisu.

title: I Can't Tell Whose Voice It Was / It's Arisu Yamabuki-kun / Flyby Anomaly
overview: While sports day continues to roll along, will the club be able to pull off Shinobu's proxy confession event?

title: Nene Saw / A Piece of Cake / I'll Cherish What You Just Said Forever
overview: The broadcast club celebrate post-sports day, while Arisu dwells on his conversation with Apollo.

title: It's Hot, So Please Be Careful / 20 Points is Basically the Margin of Error / Forgetful
overview: Arisu notices a grumpy girl at Rikka's school concert and goes to talk to her.

title: Feelings Are Impulsive / Feelings Can Escalate / Payback Achieved
overview: Nene is having a hard time with the theater club, and Arisu goes back to the drawing board to help.

title: It's All Your Fault / I'll Show You Someday / A Bolt from the Blue / We'll Make Direct Contact
overview: Iko's worried about falling behind the other girls, but Arisu has a plan.

title: Kiss or Hug / Black Cats and White Dogs
overview: The broadcasting club has a new segment in the works, and Shinobu has something on her mind.

title: While You Look Away / Secret Track / celestial
overview: Arisu must clear one final hurdle before Rikka can put on her street performance.

title: In Rikka's Front Row / Symbol for Defiance
overview: Rikka's park concert gets a rude interruption. Can she fight past it and still put on her show?
